title: brain sync [--dry-run] [--max-paths <n>] — --json success output
description: Run one upstream→refs/atlas/main absorb cycle over the adopted vault (60-B). Reads the sync_cursors row, snapshots the row's upstream_ref head, REJECT-halts on a non-ancestral or unreachable cursor BEFORE computing any diff (OQ#5, exit 2, error envelope, cursor unadvanced), otherwise walks the first-parent commit range, plans every changed note path through the scan-before-persist capture pipeline, accumulates one ChangePlan, integrates via one broker CAS fast-forward of the configured canonical ref, folds projections, and finalizes cursor + pending-quarantine set + a single index:reconcile enqueue in one transaction. Success envelope on exit 0 (clean) and exit 6 (≥1 attributable path quarantined; cursor still advanced). Upstream deletions map to ProposeArchive — never ProposeDelete/erase. Atlas never writes refs/heads/main (or any upstream ref).

cursorFrom.description: 40-hex git OID last absorbed before this cycle; null on first absorb (zero-state).

cursorTo.description: 40-hex OID the cursor advanced to (= last fully-processed commit; = upstreamHead on an unbounded fully-drained cycle). Equals cursorFrom on a no-run outcome (--dry-run or behindBy == 0), where the cursor does not move — null only at the zero-state no-run outcome (null cursor, nothing absorbed yet).

upstreamHead.description: 40-hex OID of the cursor row's upstream_ref snapshotted at cycle start.

absorbed.description: Per-path absorb outcomes; may be empty. action 'unchanged' = identical-bytes re-observation of a note already at that content on the canonical ref (no ChangePlan op, no re-embed). Synced notes are first-class vault notes, not source captures, so there is no captures/observation_count row to bump — the re-observation is recorded only as this envelope entry.

contentId.description: Serialized ContentId of the absorbed bytes.

quarantined.description: Attributable dirty paths quarantined this cycle (skipped, recorded in pending_quarantine); may be empty.

quarantineId.description: Opaque quarantine handle; the empty string "" (sentinel: no record persisted) under --dry-run.

archived.description: Notes archived because their path was deleted upstream (ProposeArchive — non-destructive); may be empty.

renamed.description: Notes renamed upstream (same contentId, blob reused); may be empty.

clearedPending.description: Paths whose stale pending_quarantine entry was removed this cycle (path scanned clean / archived / renamed away). Under --dry-run these are PLANNED removals — nothing is removed.

quarantineId.description: The quarantine handle of the entry that was (or would be) removed.

appliedOps.description: Count of ChangePlan ops the cycle's single run applied: absorbed entries with action created/modified, plus archived and renamed counts. 'unchanged' re-observations and pending-entry clears are NOT counted. 0 on --dry-run, behindBy == 0, all-quarantined, and all-unchanged cycles.

reconcileJobId.description: The enqueued index:reconcile job id (idempotencyKey = the run's canonical commit OID); null when appliedOps == 0 and on --dry-run (nothing enqueued).

cycleSeq.description: sync_cursors.cycle_seq after the cycle — post-increment on a finalized run (clean / mixed / all-quarantined); the current unchanged value on a no-run outcome (--dry-run or behindBy == 0).

truncated.description: true when --max-paths stopped the cycle before head (more commits remain); false on a no-run outcome (behindBy == 0).

x-atlas-contract.summary: One upstream→refs/atlas/main absorb cycle: OQ#5 REJECT divergence guard before any diff, per-commit first-parent walk, scan-before-persist on every absorbed byte, one run / one broker CAS / one index:reconcile enqueue, cursor + pending-quarantine finalized atomically.

flags.description: Compute + classify + scan preflight, mutate nothing: no run, no blob, no ref move, no cursor/cycle_seq/pending change, no quarantine record, no enqueue. quarantineId is "" for would-be-dirty paths; clearedPending is planned-only.

n ≥ 1. Bound one cycle: stop at the last fully-processed commit boundary once the cumulative changed-path count reaches n (an atomic oversize commit is processed in full). The cursor advances to that commit OID; truncated: true.

locks.note: during the cycle's single broker integrate

sideEffects: one run when behindBy > 0 and not --dry-run: run.planned (always), then run.integrated (broker-signed) ONLY when the ChangePlan is non-empty (appliedOps > 0); an all-quarantined/all-unchanged cycle is a finalized empty-plan run that emits run.planned only — no integrate
one broker CAS fast-forward of the configured canonical ref (refs/atlas/main) when the ChangePlan is non-empty (appliedOps > 0)
sync_cursors advance (last_absorbed_oid, cycle_seq++, reconciled pending_quarantine) in the finalize transaction
one index:reconcile enqueue (idempotencyKey = run canonical OID) when appliedOps > 0, atomic with the cursor finalize
quarantine records (AEAD, ciphertext-only) for attributable dirty paths
prohibitedEffects: writes refs/heads/main (or any upstream ref — only the configured canonical ref advances, via the broker)
ProposeDelete/erase for an upstream deletion (archive only; destructive removal stays human-gated)
any diff computation, cursor advance, run open, ledger write, or audit append after a divergence halt
--dry-run writes to no sink (no run, no cursor/cycle_seq/pending change, no quarantine record, no enqueue)

errorCodes.when: brain.config.yaml fails schema validation, the canonical ref is not an adopted broker-owned ref, or it equals the row's upstream_ref
the vault repo is missing/unreadable or the sync_cursors row is absent/malformed
the jobs drain lock is held; deferred to the next cadence
another maintenance op holds the vault-maintenance lock
the fail-closed backup watermark blocks ledger-writing runs; clears only on operator action

the cursor OID resolves but is no longer an ancestor of the row's upstream_ref head (force-push/rewrite); halt BEFORE any diff — cursor unadvanced, no run, no ledger write, no audit append; recover via sync reset
the cursor OID no longer resolves in the repo (upstream gc); same pre-diff halt semantics; recover via sync reset

a NON-attributable dirty verdict (GeneratedArtifactGuard on Atlas-generated bytes) aborts the cycle, cursor unadvanced, bytes quarantined; per-path upstream secrets are attributable and exit 6 instead
a non-terminal per-path error aborts the cycle; cursor and pending unchanged
